title: download_blob: implement + test
description:
Why: Client needs to download blobs per RFC 8620 §6.2 with optional SHA-256 integrity verification.

What: Implement JmapChatClient::download_blob in src/blob.rs:
  pub async fn download_blob(&self, download_url_template: &str, account_id: &str, blob_id: &str, name: &str, expected_sha256: Option<&str>) -> Result<Vec<u8>, ClientError>

Algorithm:
1. Expand {accountId}, {blobId}, {name} using expand_url_template
2. Build GET request with auth header (same pattern as upload_blob)
3. Send, auth_failed_if, error_for_status
4. Read body: resp.bytes().await -> Bytes, convert to Vec<u8>
5. If expected_sha256 is Some(hex): validate 64-char lowercase hex (Parse error if invalid); compute Sha256::digest(&bytes), hex-encode, compare — return BlobIntegrityMismatch if mismatch
6. Return bytes

Tests:
- wiremock GET /download/account1/blob123/file.bin returns fixture bytes; assert bytes match
- sha256 mismatch returns BlobIntegrityMismatch with correct expected/actual values
- expected_sha256=None skips check, returns bytes

Defensive rules: no unwrap(); percent-encode all URL substitutions; do not log response body or auth header.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; happy-path, sha256 mismatch, and no-sha256 tests pass
